problem_statement: Pantry edit meal detail recipe detail and other mobile overlays each implement their own sheet behavior. The duplicated logic risks inconsistent close gestures scroll locking footer actions and safe-area handling across touch devices.
in_scope: Introduce one shared mobile sheet primitive in src/components
Migrate pantry item detail meal detail and recipe detail onto the shared sheet pattern
Standardize title region close affordance body scrolling and footer action layout
requirements: The shared sheet supports safe-area padding body scroll lock outside click close and Escape close
The shared sheet supports long content without clipping footer actions
Migrated flows preserve their current edit and submit capabilities
acceptance_criteria: Pantry detail meal detail and recipe detail all use the shared sheet primitive
Sheet close behavior is consistent across touch and keyboard interactions
Footer actions remain reachable on phone portrait with long scrollable content
risks: Scroll locking may regress nested form behavior if body state is not restored correctly
implementation_notes: Migrate src/components/PantryEditSheet.tsx src/components/PlanMealTile.tsx and src/components/RecipeLibraryRow.tsx first. Do not introduce a heavyweight dependency for this pass.
